responsibilities: Gather and document detailed business requirements through stakeholder interviews, workshops, and process observation sessions
Analyze existing business processes to identify inefficiencies and recommend data-driven improvements to operations and workflows
Create process flow diagrams, use cases, and functional specifications to guide technical teams during solution development
Conduct gap analysis between current state and desired future state to define scope for process or system improvements
Build and maintain dashboards and reports using SQL and BI tools to track key performance indicators for stakeholders
Facilitate cross-functional meetings between business units and technology teams to align on project requirements and priorities
Support user acceptance testing by developing test cases and validating that delivered solutions meet business requirements
Prepare business cases and cost-benefit analyses to justify proposed process changes or technology investments
